text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While contemplating her motivation for racing,
Winning Ticket realizes that she had lost sight of
her desire not to lose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She remembers that her dream was to deliver the
best races to the audience by winning each and
every one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having realized what truly matters, she's grateful
to Biwa Hayahide and Narita Taishin for helping
her understand that and challenges them to a
scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Through the race, her two rivals recognize that
the passionate Winning Ticket they once knew
has finally returned.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that settled, the BNW trio will meet again at
the most important race at the end of the year,
the Arima Kinen.
